name: The Automaton Loom
M: w w w w w w w w w w w
w w w w w   w w w w w
w w w w w l2w w w w w
w w w w w   w w w w w
w w w w w   w w w w w
w w w w w l1w w w w w
w w w w w   w w w w w
w w w w w   w w w w w

l1.task:
Before the loom weaves, it hems the thread with a blank at each end. Fringe the row `⍵` with a 0 on either side.

`{answer} 1 0 1` gives `0 1 0 1 0`.

l2.task:
The loom reads three neighbours at a time. Gather every run of three from `⍵`.

`{answer} 0 1 1 0` gives the triplets `(0 1 1)(1 1 0)`.

aF.task: _Wolfram rules._ For the world `⍵` — with unseen 0s beyond its ends — a cell lives in the next generation if its three-neighbour pattern is one of the rule-triplets `⍺`. Forge the rune that weaves the next generation of the world.
